summary: CP has been sitting at exactly 0.15 (15%) since late January 2026, right at the threshold
content: The CP for the underlying question (will NVDA close below $100 in 2026) has been remarkably stable at 0.15 (15%) since approximately Jan 23, 2026 through Feb 3, 2026 - that's about 12 consecutive days at exactly 15%. Before that, it oscillated between 15-18% in mid-January, and was higher (17-20%) in early January. The trend has been downward from ~20-25% in late December 2025 to 15% now. The threshold for the meta-question is 15%. The CP is sitting RIGHT at the threshold. NVDA current price is $180.34, well above the $100 threshold for the underlying question.
